name: Riders of Fate

abilities.name: Ride for the Setting Sun
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard a card or drain a (soulstone) to heal an amount equal to the turn number.

actions.name: Embrace Fate
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Non-peon only. This model chooses whether this action is resisted by (fortitude) or (warding).
actions.effects: X is equal to the turn number. If this action kills the target, infuse two (soulstone).

extraction_notes: Crew includes hiring rule: This crew may hire horseman models regardless of faction. This crew must hire at least four horseman models. Friendly horseman models lose their Lone Rider ability and gain the Amalgam keyword.
The resist symbol '*' indicates the defender chooses between Df or Wp
Signature action indicated by double-cross icon before model restriction
